intents.text: Install the project/dependencies.

intents.text: Run the project.

intents.text: User indicates they have already logged in.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: I've already logged in

intents.text: User reiterates they have already logged in.

intents.text: Can the agent see the PR on this repo?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Can you see the PR we have on this repo?

intents.text: Provide details about the PR.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Yes, tell me details

intents.text: Are there existing repo parts like node search that should interoperate with the PR?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: we have node search already, right?

intents.text: Think through how to integrate precisely and present a plan before proceeding.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: think through how to integrate precisely and then i'll give the goahead

intents.text: Use both approaches, update directly, keep anything worth keeping, do what makes sense.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: WHy not both 2) We should update it directly 3) Anything worth keeping?

intents.text: Thoroughly sense-check the proposed plan.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Sense-check this please thoroughly

intents.text: Do we already have tests in the repo?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Do we have tests already?

intents.text: Create a test for every tool function that the agent can sense-check responses on.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: create a test for every tool function that you as an agent can sense-check

intents.text: Do the test responses all subjectively make sense to the agent?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: do the tes tresponses allmake sense to you?

intents.text: Go through all changes made and explain them succinctly.

intents.text: What does the TASK ALIASES feature do?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: What does that TASK ALIASES thing even do?

intents.text: Is the TASK ALIASES feature sensible?

intents.text: Push changes to the PR and merge it to main.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: push this stuff to the pr and then merge it to main?

intents.text: Does the SKILLS content feed into what we have or is it orthogonal?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Does the stuff in SKILLs feed into what we have or orthogonal

intents.text: Think through and investigate the SKILLS relationship thoroughly.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: think this through and investigate

intents.text: What is the purpose of SKILL.md?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: what's the purpsoe of SKILL.md?

intents.text: Why would SKILL.md not be the same as what we already have?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: why would it not be the same as what we have?

intents.text: Could this repo itself be the skill, directing agents to use it?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Could this repo itself be the skill?

intents.text: Make the skill about agents knowing they can use this repo's tools to search, create, edit nodes and workflows.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: use the tools in this repo to actually like search things and create nodes

intents.text: How does the MCP server play into the skills and tools?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: how does the MCP server play into this/

intents.verbatim_excerpt: was comfy nodes just one skill?

intents.verbatim_excerpt: And what about the MCP?

intents.verbatim_excerpt: is it good and descriptive for what we need? And should the skills be more
